name: Convertible JPY Token
collateral: ETH only; 130% minimum collateralization ratio at issuance (110% MCR for liquidation); one-time borrowing fee with no accrued interest
pegMechanism: Overcollateralized ETH CDPs (pledges) with game-theory peg maintenance: (1) hard floor via on-chain redemption of 1 CJPY for 1 JPY worth of ETH from the riskiest pledge; (2) subrogation mechanism uses accumulated protocol fees to automatically repay positions below 100% health rate; (3) non-forced liquidation where any user can redeem debt positions below 130% using market-purchased CJPY
